title: Stir-Fried Egg Scramble
description: A simple scrambled egg dish, quickly cooked with silky stir-fry sauce.
instructions: 1. Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
2. Heat the stir-fry sauce in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
3. Add the whisked eggs to the pan and scramble them together with the sauce.
4. Cook until the eggs are set and the sauce is bubbly.
